_comment: Live loop state. The PM updates this at the end of every tick. Survives context resets.
project: touchRPG (working title 람팡) — touch hunting action, Unity, portrait
active_task: T003 P0-C 3-phase session + solo run to completion: quality-loop running in background (wf_42ac76c9-d26). T001 (97/100) and T002 (94/100) both DONE.
_paused_note: Set paused:true to make the loop go straight back to sleep without doing work. The kill switch — the user can stop the team without stopping the loop itself.
_escalations_note: Tasks the quality loop could not pass within its round budget. The PM must surface these to the user rather than let them silently look done.
_state_reason: 2026-07-17 21:50 (tick 49): touchRPG BOOTSTRAPPED. Director delivered a full GDD (desktop 게임기획서_v0.1.md -> touchRPG/docs/spec/00-gdd-v0.1.md) = THE SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH per its own §0 (conflicts: the doc wins). P0 = vertical slice; its ONE validation question is '터치 패링이 손맛이 있는가' and GDD §10 forbids starting P1 before it is answered. CRITICAL RULE: the live TBDs (§13; as of v0.3 that is TBD-1..7, 11, 12, 13) are deliberately undecided — the team MUST NOT fill them in; the GDD calls hallucinated design its most-guarded failure mode (= our Nodding Loop). Life Town paused/resumable (see VISION §2 paused section; its next task = real gameplay, already decided).

PAUSED by director 2026-07-17 23:30: '오늘은 여기까지. 내일 계속할꺼야.' Clean stop, nothing lost. RESUME: set paused=false + /tick.
